← All IRC handicap examples

IRC — RDG average excluding DNC up to the discard limit (handicap path)

Redress in a handicap (IRC) fleet, HalSail RDG type 2. Until now redress was only resolved for scratch fleets; this exercises the handicap standings path. All boats race TCC 1.0 so corrected time = elapsed and places follow finish order. 4 boats (N=4 → DNC = 5), 4 races → 1 discard allowed. Alice is granted redress in race 4. Other races: R1 DNC (5), R2 DNC (5), R3 = 2. One DNC excluded (allowance 1), the other kept → mean(5, 2) = 3.5.

Scoring system: IRC

Race 1

Gun time: 14:00:00
RankNameSail #TCCFinish timeETTCFCTPoints
1 Bob 2 1.000 14:50:00 50m 00s 1.0000 50m 00s 1
2 Carol 3 1.000 15:00:00 60m 00s 1.0000 60m 00s 2
3 Dave 4 1.000 15:10:00 70m 00s 1.0000 70m 00s 3
— Alice 1 1.000 DNC — 1.0000 — 5

Gun time: 14:00:00
RankNameSail #TCCFinish timeETTCFCTPoints
1 Bob 2 1.000 14:50:00 50m 00s 1.0000 50m 00s 1
2 Carol 3 1.000 15:00:00 60m 00s 1.0000 60m 00s 2
3 Dave 4 1.000 15:10:00 70m 00s 1.0000 70m 00s 3
— Alice 1 1.000 DNC — 1.0000 — 5

Race 3

Gun time: 14:00:00
RankNameSail #TCCFinish timeETTCFCTPoints
1 Bob 2 1.000 14:50:00 50m 00s 1.0000 50m 00s 1
2 Alice 1 1.000 15:00:00 60m 00s 1.0000 60m 00s 2
3 Carol 3 1.000 15:10:00 70m 00s 1.0000 70m 00s 3
4 Dave 4 1.000 15:20:00 80m 00s 1.0000 80m 00s 4

Race 4

Gun time: 14:00:00
RankNameSail #TCCFinish timeETTCFCTPoints
1 Bob 2 1.000 14:50:00 50m 00s 1.0000 50m 00s 1
2 Carol 3 1.000 15:00:00 60m 00s 1.0000 60m 00s 2
3 Dave 4 1.000 15:10:00 70m 00s 1.0000 70m 00s 3
— Alice 1 1.000 RDG — 1.0000 — 5

Series standings

RankNameSail #R1R2R3R4TotalNet
1 Bob 2 1111 4 3
2 Carol 3 2232 9 6

4 Alice 1 DNCDNC2RDG 15.5 10.5
